subject: Confirmed — CHT Practice Examination, November 7, 2026 (8:00 a.m. HST)
snippet: Practice exam Nov 7 2026, 8:00 a.m. HST, Honolulu Testing Center, 1585 Kapiolani Blvd Suite 610.
body:
Aloha Meghan,

Your CHT Practice Examination self-scheduled session is confirmed.

  Candidate: Meghan Douglas, OTR/L (HI-OT-4892)
  Session type: Practice examination (self-scheduled online window)
  Date: November 7, 2026
  Report time: 7:30 a.m. HST
  Start time: 8:00 a.m. HST
  Duration: 4 hours (240 minutes)
  Venue: Honolulu Testing Center
           1585 Kapiolani Blvd, Suite 610
           Honolulu, HI 96814
  Confirmation code: HTCC-PX-2026-11-07-MD-8419
  Reference this confirmation for your Nov 7 timeline; earlier calendar blocks and checklist entries may reflect the placeholder 9:00 a.m. draft and are superseded.

Bring a photo ID. Personal items must be stored in the lobby locker before check-in. Water is permitted at the seat.

The January 9, 2027 credentialing sitting remains a separate registration and is not included in this confirmation.

Mahalo,
HTCC Applications Coordinator
applications@htcertification.org

subject: Reminder — $645 registration fee outstanding, Jan 9 2027 sitting
snippet: Registration fee outstanding, second recommender letter and refreshed Form A still needed.
body:
Aloha Meghan,

This is a courtesy reminder that the $645 registration fee for the January 9, 2027 credentialing examination remains outstanding on your applicant record (case MD-2026-11).

Registration payment, second recommender letter, and refreshed Form A (v2026-07) are the three open items on your applicant file. All eligibility hour attestation must be re-signed against the reconciled ledger, not the earlier draft you submitted.

Confirmation of the January 9 sitting is only issued after all three items are received.

Mahalo,
HTCC Registrar
registrar@htcertification.org

subject: Reservation confirmed — Sunrise Lanai Kailua, Oct 24 10:00 a.m., party of 6

body:
Aloha Meghan,

Your reservation is confirmed.

  Sunrise Lanai Kailua
  Date: October 24, 2026
  Time: 10:00 a.m. HST
  Party size: 6
  Under name: Meghan Douglas
  Confirmation: SL-20261024-06-MD

subject: Course update — new eligibility clarification memo posted
snippet: New eligibility clarification memo posted to the shared course folder, supersedes older 2024 guidance.
body:
Aloha Meghan,

A new clarification memo has been uploaded to the shared course folder covering hour categorization decisions that came up in the recent live sessions.

  File: Instructor_Eligibility_Clarification_Memo_2026-09-24.pdf
  Location: shared course folder, Instructor Memos & Clarifications
  Effective: immediately for any ledger reconciliation you are doing ahead of the January credentialing sitting.

This memo supersedes the older 2024 AOTA-style guideline pages several of you have been mirroring in personal reference libraries. Where the two disagree, defer to this memo.

Please review before the next live session.

Mahalo,
Dr. Priya Suresh, OTR/L, CHT

subject: Thanksgiving at the house — head count
snippet: Thanksgiving head count, mom asking whether you and Justin are both in.
body:
Hi honey. I have Uncle Tad and Fumiko coming. Kai says he is in but the shop schedule is not confirmed yet. Are you and Justin both coming? Let me know so I can plan the ham size.

Love, Mom

subject: Re: Thanksgiving at the house — head count
snippet: Me for sure, Justin I will confirm this week.
body: Me for sure. Justin I will confirm this week.

subject: Shop moved my Saturday — can we do brunch after
snippet: Shop moved Saturday, will still make brunch, might be 5 min late.
body: Boss changed the Saturday coverage. I can still do the brunch on the 24th but I might roll in five minutes late. Do not wait on me for the pancakes.

subject: Fumiko this week
snippet: Fumiko good couple of days, asked about you twice, bring ube pastries.
body: Hey Meg. Fumiko had a good couple of days, walked to the mailbox on her own on Wednesday. She asked about you twice, that is why I am writing. Bring the ube pastries again if you come Sunday.

subject: What are we covering on the 16th?
snippet: What are we covering on the 16th, Brian asked.
body: You said last time you would call the topic for the 16th. Brian asked me. Anything you want to focus on based on the review course?

subject: Renters insurance renewal — action needed
snippet: Renters insurance renewal at $18/mo, autopay active.
body:
Aloha Meghan,

Your renters policy renews November 30, 2026 at $18/month. No coverage changes. Autopay is active. Reply to opt out.

Hawaii Renters Insurance
